## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` green
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` green
- [ ] `cargo check` green (if `apps/desktop/src-tauri` changed)
- [ ] Tests added/updated (TDD — co-located `*.test.ts`)
- [ ] No secret in any committed file, bundle, or audit path
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or a decision changed (`docs/`)
- [ ] Conventional commit(s), one logical change each
